attributes.action: Make period supplies free for all
attributes.additional_details: I think you should do this as its a basic necessity for all people. How is it fair that people have to buy period supplies for us not to bleed everywhere. Have you ever thought about how people get period supplies as they are expensive and have to be brought ever month. Some young girls are scared to ask as they know there parents don't have enough money. It can have an impact on young girls education. They also may have self-esteem problems as there parents can't afford what they need.
attributes.background: Consider making period supplies free for all

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Fund free female sanitary products for all women and girls
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756958
